message:
feat(stream): replace Instant::now() with injectable Time in Debounce and Throttle

Both stream combinators previously called Instant::now() directly,
making elapsed-time logic impossible to test without thread::sleep()
(which is flaky and slow).

Debounce:
- Add time_getter field and with_time_getter() constructor
- pending tuple now stores Time instead of Instant
- poll_next() uses injectable clock for elapsed calculation
- Sleep timer uses Sleep::with_time_getter for consistent time source
- Add time_getter() accessor
- Convert debounce_emits_immediately_when_timer_future_is_ready test to
  use explicit Time values
- Add debounce_respects_custom_time_getter_without_sleeping test that
  verifies quiet-period expiry purely via clock advancement

Throttle:
- Add time_getter field and with_time_getter() constructor
- last_yield now stores Time instead of Instant
- poll_next() uses injectable clock for rate-limit window
- Add time_getter() accessor
- Convert throttle_with_delay test from thread::sleep to deterministic
  clock advancement with exact assertions
- Update throttle_accessors test to verify custom time source

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
